assertions.description: navigator.gpu is exposed as the WebGPU entry point.
GPU.getPreferredCanvasFormat is exposed for canvas configuration.
getConfiguration returns the format and alphaMode after configure().
assertions.test: (async()=>{const adapter=await navigator.gpu.requestAdapter();if(!adapter)return false;const device=await adapter.requestDevice();const canvas=document.createElement('canvas');const context=canvas.getContext('webgpu');const format=navigator.gpu.getPreferredCanvasFormat();context.configure({device,format,alphaMode:'premultiplied'});const config=context.getConfiguration();const ok=config&&config.device===device&&config.format===format&&config.alphaMode==='premultiplied';device.destroy();return ok;})()

assertions.description: getConfiguration includes usage, viewFormats, colorSpace, and toneMapping members.
assertions.test: (async()=>{const adapter=await navigator.gpu.requestAdapter();if(!adapter)return false;const device=await adapter.requestDevice();const canvas=document.createElement('canvas');const context=canvas.getContext('webgpu');context.configure({device,format:navigator.gpu.getPreferredCanvasFormat(),alphaMode:'opaque'});const config=context.getConfiguration();const ok=typeof config.usage==='number'&&Array.isArray(config.viewFormats)&&typeof config.colorSpace==='string'&&typeof config.toneMapping==='object';device.destroy();return ok;})()
